auditor: Chan Nowosad Boates Chartered Professional Accountants
one_time_description: ISC forgiveness of comprehensive land claim negotiation loan debt (Treaty Loan) totalling $1,828,575
economic_notes: Band holds 1/3 equity interest in Gilakas'la Kwa Holdings Ltd. (nominal value, not on balance sheet), received $234,646 income from it in 2020. Kwakiutl Nation Development Corporation (GBE) earns royalties from fish farming, mineral extraction, power production and rentals. Post year-end revenue sharing agreement with BC for Knob Hill Windfarm project with retroactive payment of $326,378 for 2011-2019.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 (ended March 31, 2020). Prior year (2019) figures were restated for prior period adjustment recognizing $1,828,575 treaty loan obligation previously unrecorded. The same amount was forgiven by Canada in FY2020 and recognized as revenue (one-time item). One consolidated subsidiary: 0819357 B.C. Ltd. One GBE on modified equity basis: Kwakiutl Nation Development Corporation. Band also holds nominal 1/3 interest in Gilakas'la Kwa Holdings Ltd. not on balance sheet. No schedule of remuneration provided. total_government_transfers includes ISC $2,692,011 + Provincial $474,001 + Fisheries and Oceans Canada $293,925 + First Nation Health Authority $1,164,316 + North Vancouver Island Aboriginal Training Society $63,420 + First Nations Education Steering Committee $271,675 = $4,959,348; however segment disclosure shows Federal (non-ISC) $1,740,722 + Provincial $534,101 + ISC $2,692,011 = $4,966,834 — used statement of operations lines summing identifiable government transfers: ISC $2,692,011 + Provincial $474,001 + DFO $293,925 + FNHA $1,164,316 + NVIATS $63,420 + FNESC $271,675 = $4,959,348; OSR = $8,293,034 - $4,959,348 = $3,333,686. Revised osr to $3,333,686 and total_government_transfers to $4,959,348.
